lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches but no major dents or damage. The interior is well-maintained with slight signs of use. All mechanical and electronic components are fully functional.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero scratches or dings. Inside, the leather upholstery is pristine, showing no signs of wear, and all electronic features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak condition; the engine runs smoothly and quietly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and it has been meticulously maintained with a full service history. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a like-new driving experience.

Looking for a reliable and well-cared-for vehicle? This car is in good condition and ready for many more miles! It offers a smooth, comfortable driving experience and has been maintained nicely over the years. With its clean appearance and solid performance, it’s a fantastic choice for anyone seeking a dependable ride at a great price!

This vehicle is in truly exceptional, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained throughout its life. It is in mint condition, showing virtually no signs of wear inside or out. The exterior paint retains its original factory luster with no chips, scratches, or dents, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. Mechanically, the car is flawless; the engine runs smoothly, and all systems—from the climate control to the specialized electronics—function exactly as they did the day it left the dealership. The interior is pristine, featuring untouched upholstery and a smoke-free environment. This is a collector-grade example that has been garage-kept and comes with a complete service history. It is ready for the road or a private collection with no work required.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repairs to be functional. The exterior has major body damage, visible rust, and widespread paint failure. The interior shows heavy wear with significant staining and multiple tears in the upholstery.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Presenting in commendable condition, it features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile consistent with our high standards of excellence. An exemplary acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking refined value.

Hi everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s been such a fantastic ride. It’s in really solid condition and has been super dependable for me. It looks great, drives smoothly, and is totally ready for a new owner to hit the road! I’ve taken good care of it, and I think you’ll really love how it handles. Drop me a message if you’re interested—I’d be happy to show you around it!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain benefits from a recently serviced variable M differential lock. The chassis maintains its structural integrity with proactive rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Suspension dynamics remain sharp,
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minimal wear.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable driver. The exterior finish remains vibrant, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use, while the alloy wheels are free of major curbing. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with all electronic features—including the infotainment and climate control—functioning perfectly. The upholstery shows minimal wear, primarily confined to the driver's seat bolster. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced regularly, with recent oil and filter changes documented. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the brakes provide firm, consistent stopping power. With a solid service history and tires that retain significant tread, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced combination of performance and reliability. Every component has been evaluated to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness, providing a refined driving experience that exceeds expectations for its class.

Presented for your consideration is this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a harmonious blend of performance and reliability. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this model demonstrates exceptional mechanical health and structural integrity. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber driving experience and lasting value. This vehicle stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in superior operational standing, ready for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute favorite ride, and it’s honestly been such a dream to drive. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today! You’re going to love how smooth it feels. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The suspension has been upgraded with polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring sharp turn-in and lateral stability. While the exterior shows minor cosmetic patina indicative of spirited use, the powertrain remains robust with consistent compression across all cylinders. A true driver's specification for the purist seeking analog feedback and linear power delivery.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition throughout. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor road wear expected of a well-loved car, while the interior is exceptionally clean, featuring supple upholstery and a smoke-free cabin. Mechanically, it is sound; the engine starts promptly, shifts are seamless, and the suspension provides a composed ride. All electronics, including the infotainment and climate control, function perfectly. It has a comprehensive service history, ensuring peace of mind for its next owner. This is a reliable, high-performing choice for anyone seeking quality and value.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated to meet rigorous standards of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Demonstrating a consistent maintenance history and robust performance capabilities, it offers an optimal balance of sophistication and reliability for the discerning driver. This acquisition represents a premier opportunity to secure a high-caliber vehicle at a competitive valuation.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has been meticulously maintained to ensure consistent performance and enduring reliability. Its well-preserved condition reflects a high standard of care, offering a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a new home! It’s been so well-loved and is in really solid shape—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip. It runs like a dream and has been super reliable for me. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it!

Offering a mechanically sound E92 M3 powered by the S65 4.0L V8, featuring eight independent throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This example utilizes a 6-speed manual gearbox paired with the M Variable Differential Lock for superior power delivery. Key preventative maintenance is complete, including rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators. The suspension retains its factory Electronic
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and presents beautifully both inside and out. The exterior paint finish retains a brilliant luster, showing only minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful road use. All body panels are straight, and the alloy wheels are free of significant curbing. Inside, the cabin reflects a smoke-free and pet-free history; the upholstery is firm and clean, the dashboard is free of cracks, and all electronic features—including the climate control and infotainment system—operate perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with a consistent idle, backed by a comprehensive service history that includes recent fluid changes and a multi-point inspection. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. This car is a reliable, turn-key example that has been cherished by its previous owner and is ready for many more miles of enjoyment.

We are pleased to offer this impeccably maintained vehicle, curated for the driver who demands both performance and prestige. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional care, this unit presents in superior operational condition with a refined aesthetic presence. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to durability and engineering excellence. This is a distinguished opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that perfectly balances sophisticated styling with proven reliability.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, characterized by its mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic. Demonstrating consistent care and a documented history of professional servicing, this model offers a balanced combination of performance and reliability. It represents an excellent acquisition for the discerning buyer seeking a high-quality driving experience and enduring value.

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically sound example of the high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers exceptional throttle response via its individual throttle bodies, paired with a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. Critical maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive Double-VANOS overhaul and a reinforced rear subframe to maintain chassis rigidity. The suspension geometry remains tight with updated bushings and refreshed dampers, ensuring the limited-slip differential effectively manages torque through the corners.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine.

This meticulously maintained sedan strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that retains a high-gloss luster, accented by well-preserved chrome trim and only minor, expected road wear on the front fascia consistent with careful use. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with supple leather seating that remains supportive and comfortable, showing only gentle character lines on the driver’s side. Every technological feature—from the responsive infotainment screen to the dual-zone climate control—is in full working order. Under the hood, the engine delivers a smooth, quiet performance, backed by a comprehensive service history and recent preventative maintenance including a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection. Rolling on premium alloys with significant tire tread remaining, this vehicle is ready for the open road. It offers a premium driving experience for the discerning buyer who values both aesthetic appeal and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who prioritizes mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of long-term value and driving excellence.
